CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISPICKVAL( Status , 'Open'),ISPICKVAL( Status , 'In Progress'),ISPICKVAL( Status , 'New')) , LEFT("Only Applicable for ALD Sat Integration. Following fields needs to be populated to initiate the integration: " & IF( ISBLANK(Subject ) , "Subject, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contract__c ) , "Contract, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Subsidiary_Indicator__c ) , "Subsidiary Indicator, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( TEXT(External_Case_Category__c )) , "Case Category, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( TEXT(External_Case_Detail__c)) , "Case Detail, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( ContactId ) , "Contact Name, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contact.Email ) , "Contact Email, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contact.Phone ) , "Contact Phone, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Mileage__c) , "Mileage, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Appointment_Date_Time_Option1__c) , "Appointment Date & Time (option 1), ", "") ,LEN("Only Applicable for Maintenance/Preventive Maintenance. Following fields needs to be populated to initiate the inegration: " & IF( ISBLANK(Subject ) , "Subject, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contract__c ) , "Contract, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Subsidiary_Indicator__c ) , "Subsidiary Indicator, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( ContactId ) , "Contact Name, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contact.Email ) , "Contact Email, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Contact.Phone ) , "Contact Phone, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Mileage__c) , "Mileage, ", "") & IF( ISBLANK( Appointment_Date_Time_Option1__c) , "Appointment Date & Time (option 1), ", ""))-2), "This Case can be Integrated to ALD Sat")
CustomField.label: Validation for ALD Sat Integration
